title: Prepare at Palace Beautiful
description: Rest without guilt, hear Watchful, and take up armour before accusation comes.
description_zh: 无愧地歇息，聆听守望者，并在控告来到前穿戴军装。

steps.description: Receive the armour and promise for the valley.
steps.description_zh: 领受为山谷预备的军装与应许。

steps.description: Descend from the palace prepared, not proud.
steps.description_zh: 预备好而非骄傲地下山。
